subject: english
topic_title: Comprehension: Statutory Topics, Theme, and Key Sentences
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Define statutory topic, theme, and key sentence
Identify these features in a passage
Analyse a passage using the concepts

sections.heading: Definitions
sections.content: Statutory topics are the fixed main topics of a passage. Theme is the subject or main idea of a passage. Key sentences are the topic sentences that express the main idea of each paragraph.

sections.heading: Illustration
sections.content: The note analyses a passage on plant nourishment and identifies the statutory topic, themes, and key sentences from its paragraphs.
